title: Reckon Review
blurb: A GitHub app that blocks a pull request from merging until a human can explain, in their own words, what the change actually does.

title: Zybit
blurb: Voice AI that writes a dentist's spoken findings straight into Open Dental, on the right tooth and in their own codes.

title: RWA Analyzer
blurb: Verifies whether a tokenized real-world asset is actually backed, instead of rubber-stamping it. Runs over MCP, CLI, and HTTP.

title: Kite Credit
blurb: A credit score for people with no local credit file, assembled from ZK-verified bank statements, GitHub history, and wallet activity.

title: CommitMint
blurb: An app that lets you stake money on your goals and only pays out once your progress is verified. Settlement runs on Anchor smart contracts.

title: ComputeSwarm
blurb: A marketplace that rents out idle GPUs, metering usage and settling per-second with automated micropayments.

title: GraphRAG Dodd-Frank
blurb: Answers questions across the 800-page Dodd-Frank Act using a knowledge graph instead of a flat vector store.

title: Texas Hold'em
blurb: Networked multiplayer poker written from scratch in OCaml, with a TCP server and terminal clients.
